_comment: Stage 2 PILOT spec -- NOT the real evaluation. Validates the campaign->postprocess->kofta-stats pipeline end-to-end with the toy docker/smoke.c target and the offline --mock SHS client (no API, no cost). Only KOFTA-buildable configs (kofta/kshs/kshsng); weifuzz/llmonly need an external wei-fuzz binary not in this repo. Must run inside the ubuntu:20.04 container (glibc<=2.33) via docker/run-pilot.sh, which sets up bin/{target}, seeds/{target}, opts/{target}.txt, srcmap.txt under cwd. Durations are tiny on purpose -- the goal is a clean artifact->table round-trip, not real fuzzing dynamics.

commands.kofta: timeout {duration} env KOFTA_SHS_BUDGET=0 ./kofta-fuzz -i seeds/{target} -o {out} -m none -t 5000 -k opts/{target}.txt -- bin/{target}
commands.kshs: timeout {duration} env PYTHONPATH=. KOFTA_SRCMAP=srcmap.txt KOFTA_SHS=1 KOFTA_SHS_BIN=./kofta-shs KOFTA_SHS_CACHE={cache} KOFTA_SHS_COST={cost} ./kofta-fuzz -i seeds/{target} -o {out} -m none -t 5000 -k opts/{target}.txt -- bin/{target}
commands.kshsng: timeout {duration} env PYTHONPATH=. KOFTA_SRCMAP=srcmap.txt KOFTA_SHS=1 KOFTA_SHS_NOSLICE=1 KOFTA_SHS_BIN=./kofta-shs KOFTA_SHS_CACHE={cache} KOFTA_SHS_COST={cost} ./kofta-fuzz -i seeds/{target} -o {out} -m none -t 5000 -k opts/{target}.txt -- bin/{target}
